# 居家環境與社會參與問卷回應範例 - 臺灣長期照顧實作指引 (Taiwan Long-Term Care Implementation Guide) v0.4.1

* [**Table of Contents**](toc.md)
* [**Artifacts Summary**](artifacts.md)
* **居家環境與社會參與問卷回應範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 居家環境與社會參與問卷回應範例

Profile: [照顧管理評估量表－居家環境與社會參與問卷回覆](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSSociety.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-society-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[LTCQuestionnaireSociety](Questionnaire-ltc-questionnaire-society.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)H1a
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案目前的居住狀況？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 與家人或其他人同住
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)H2a
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案與親朋好友多久會聯絡 1 次，包括見面、通電話或寫信？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 每週至少 1 次
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)H2b
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案目前是否有參與下列的活動？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 每個月至少 1 次
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)H2c
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案最近三個月內為了與親友互動、參與活動，是否需要服務介入協助？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)H2c1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案最近三個月內為了與親友互動、參與活動，需要協助的方式？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 監督陪同
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)H2c2
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案最近三個月內為了與親友互動、參與活動，需要協助的頻率？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 至少一個月 1 次，但不是每個星期
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format



## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "ltc-questionnaire-response-society-example",
  "meta" : {
    "profile" : ["http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/StructureDefinition/LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSSociety"]
  },
  "questionnaire" : "http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/Questionnaire/ltc-questionnaire-society",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-cms-chen-ming-hui-example"
  },
  "authored" : "2024-09-15T10:50:00+08:00",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "H1a",
    "text" : "請問個案目前的居住狀況？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "與家人或其他人同住"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "H2a",
    "text" : "請問個案與親朋好友多久會聯絡 1 次，包括見面、通電話或寫信？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "每週至少 1 次"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "H2b",
    "text" : "請問個案目前是否有參與下列的活動？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "每個月至少 1 次"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "H2c",
    "text" : "請問個案最近三個月內為了與親友互動、參與活動，是否需要服務介入協助？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "H2c1",
    "text" : "請問個案最近三個月內為了與親友互動、參與活動，需要協助的方式？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "監督陪同"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "H2c2",
    "text" : "請問個案最近三個月內為了與親友互動、參與活動，需要協助的頻率？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "至少一個月 1 次，但不是每個星期"
    }]
  }]
}

```
